column2: summary
In a near-future France, a university professor navigates his personal life as a Muslim political party rises to power, examining politics, identity and alienation.
Jack Morgan travels to Paris to help a client find his missing granddaughter and uncovers a series of gruesome murders tied to the elite, racing to stop the killer.
A family joins a research project raising a chimpanzee as a human child, confronting issues of race, language and belonging while secrets and past traumas surface.
After the world’s water disappears, neighbors in a Los Angeles suburb band together and then turn against each other as survival instincts kick in.
When a woman’s identity is stolen and a brilliant geneticist is murdered, a rogue team called Forensic Instincts races to expose a conspiracy and stop a killer.
An art critic with synesthesia and a self-taught painter experience the bohemian art scene of late-1970s and early-1980s New York as their lives and careers intertwine.
A Manhattan family and their friends vacation in Mallorca, where long-held secrets and tensions emerge against the sun-drenched island backdrop.
A secret organization staffed by young women trained as assassins comes under attack, forcing them to question their missions and destiny amid prophecies and betrayal.
An obsessed reader murders his favorite author to steal notebooks of an unpublished novel; decades later the notebooks surface, luring in a teen and awakening the killer.
A fable in which Father Time is banished to a cave for centuries and later sent to Earth to teach a business tycoon and a teenage girl the true meaning of time.
Mary recounts the story of Jesus’ ministry and crucifixion from her perspective, challenging the followers’ narratives and questioning her son’s divinity.
Journalist J.B. Collins witnesses ISIS seize the U.S. president and must navigate Middle East conflict and political intrigue to rescue him and avert disaster.
A grieving teacher traveling with his son’s ashes reluctantly agrees to take two troubled teens on his road trip, forming an unlikely bond that heals them all.
A famous photographer in financial trouble moves to a remote cabin, where she rediscovers her art and unexpectedly finds love and a new sense of purpose.
A couple pretends to separate to improve their chances of securing funding for their autistic son, forcing them to confront family secrets and personal challenges.
Hospitalized with complications, Lucy Barton reconnects with her estranged mother, and their conversations uncover painful memories of poverty, abuse and longing.
An unassuming older woman sets out on a journey to New York to buy a simple yet perfect dress, leading to a deeper exploration of identity and self-worth.
A retired detective is taunted by a mass murderer who drove a stolen Mercedes into a crowd; he sets out to stop the killer before he strikes again.
A deep-cover operative known as Pilgrim is pulled back to track a terrorist mastermind planning a catastrophic biological attack on the United States.
Modern retelling of Pride and Prejudice set in Cincinnati with reality-show–obsessed Bennet sisters, a neurosurgeon Darcy and commentary on contemporary society.
A woman returns home to her family’s Sonoma vineyard days before her wedding, only to discover secrets about her fiancé and family that change her future.
Orphaned Samantha Moore attends graduate school funded by an anonymous benefactor and pours her heart into letters addressed “Dear Mr. Knightley,” slowly discovering herself.
As political intrigue and personal crises unfold, the Clifton and Barrington families face life-changing decisions involving revenge, love and corporate power.
A man must transport his late grandfather’s final breaths, captured in a balloon, back to Iowa; along the way he encounters eccentric characters and family revelations.
A cranky widower plans to end his life but is interrupted by boisterous new neighbors, a stray cat and a series of events that give him new purpose.
Riley believes her sister committed suicide as a teenager, but years later she learns her sister is alive, forcing her to unravel a web of family secrets.
At a Passover Seder hosted by a wealthy couple, secrets about marriage, ambition and family erupt, exposing cracks in their seemingly perfect lives.
A satirical novel follows a struggling chef who discovers a lost masterpiece, plunging her into the cutthroat London art world and uncovering the painting’s dark past.
On Mothering Sunday 1924, a maid has a secret affair with a wealthy heir; the day alters her life and influences the writer she becomes.
A young woman learns about lasting love and the power of white lies from her grandmother after experiencing her own romantic missteps and family drama.
A rebellious teenage girl forced into a polygamous marriage in 1970s Idaho escapes with a boy and embarks on a wild road trip across America.
English teacher Jake Epping travels back in time to stop Lee Harvey Oswald and prevent JFK’s assassination, but altering history has unforeseen consequences.
After his young daughter is murdered, a grieving father returns to the crime scene shack and has a transformative encounter with God, grappling with faith and forgiveness.
Three interconnected stories—from a 1904 Portuguese villager on a quest, to a Canadian senator grieving in the 1930s, to a modern-day widower—explore loss and faith.
Mimi Miller recounts her coming-of-age in a rural valley as she uncovers family secrets, battles a flood project, and learns about love, loyalty and change.
In an alternate 1970s America where JFK survived, a traumatized Vietnam veteran writes a novel about veterans whose memories are erased and rogue killers roam.
An amnesiac man with extraordinary skills tries to piece together his past while evading assassins and uncovering his identity as the legendary Jason Bourne.
Wrongfully convicted Allie Marshall returns home after prison to clear her name and reconnect with her daughter, uncovering her sister’s devastating secret.
A geisha narrates her journey from a poor fishing village to the height of Kyoto’s geisha district, revealing the hidden world of love, art and ambition in Japan.
Louisa Clark becomes caregiver to Will Traynor, a wealthy quadriplegic man; as they bond, both learn about love, choice and what makes life worth living.
A NASA discovery deep in Arctic ice becomes a political flashpoint; when investigators discover evidence of fraud, assassins attack to keep the secret hidden.
Monsieur Perdu sells books from his floating barge on the Seine, prescribing novels to heal customers’ ailments, but embarks on a river journey to heal his own heart.
New attorney Mitch McDeere accepts a lucrative job at a Memphis law firm only to discover it’s a front for the Mafia; he must decide between cooperation and survival.
Three very different American women living in Hong Kong—Mercy, Hilary and Margaret—confront tragedies, secrets and cultural dislocation in a close-knit expat community.
Hermann Hesse’s novella follows a young man named Siddhartha on his spiritual quest for enlightenment, exploring asceticism, sensuality and the wisdom of the river.
Cassie Carter reconnects with her estranged sisters after leaving an abusive marriage, rediscovering the importance of family and forgiveness.
NSA cryptanalyst Susan Fletcher battles to stop a brilliant hacker who threatens to release an unbreakable code capable of crippling U.S. intelligence.
A vast cast of characters debates the role of individualism and capitalism as industrialists withdraw from society in protest against a collectivist government.
In 1950s Greenwich Village, three ambitious young people—an aspiring writer, a would-be editor and a Black journalist—pursue success in publishing at a personal cost.
During World War II, two French sisters take different paths—one joining the Resistance, the other struggling to survive at home—highlighting women’s courage in wartime.
